de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma

Class TacletProofObligationInput

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma.TacletProofObligationInput
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput

    public class TacletProofObligationInput
extends Object
implements ProofOblInput, IPersistablePO
    The Class TacletProofObligationInput is a special purpose proof obligations for taclet proofs. A proof for a KeY system-taclet can thus be reloaded and checked against the current environment.
    Author:
    mattias ulbrich

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.IPersistablePO

    • Constructor Detail

      • TacletProofObligationInput

        public TacletProofObligationInput(String tacletName,
                          InitConfig initConfig)
        Instantiates a new taclet proof obligation input object.
        Parameters:
        tacletName - the name of the taclet which is to be created
        initConfig - the initconfig under which the PO is to be examined

    • Method Detail

      • fillSaveProperties

        public void fillSaveProperties(Properties properties)
                        throws IOException
        Description copied from interface: IPersistablePO
        This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
        Specified by:
        fillSaveProperties in interface IPersistablePO
        Parameters:
        properties - The Properties to fill with the proof obligation specific settings.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

        public String name()
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        Returns the name of the proof obligation input.
        Specified by:
        name in interface ProofOblInput

      • createProofEnvironment

        private ProofEnvironment createProofEnvironment()
                                         throws ProofInputException

      • fileCollection

        private Collection<File> fileCollection(String[] strings)

      • getPO

        public ProofAggregate getPO()
                     throws ProofInputException
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input. If there is still no input available because nothing has been read yet null is returned.
        Specified by:
        getPO in interface ProofOblInput
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • implies

        public boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
        Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput
        If true, then this PO implies the passed one.
        Specified by:
        implies in interface ProofOblInput
